subtitle: Customer assets, activity and churn risk across sites. Balance is customer prepaid liability, not upstream channel balance.
coldStartBanner: Spend-drop signals need at least {days} days of accumulated snapshots. Currently {have} day(s) available; churn-by-drop is not shown yet.
degradedNote: {n} site(s) excluded from aggregation (unsupported engine or unreachable).
liabilityDupNote: Cross-site: the same person on two sites is counted per site, so liability may double-count.
estimateNote: Spend figures are estimated from prepaid balance changes, not exact billing.
statLiabilityHint: Sum of prepaid balance (USD); may double-count across sites
tableEmpty: No customers found across live sites.
configDesc: Tier thresholds and churn rules. Amounts in USD (USD to RMB is 1:1 in this market).
cfgTierBigHint: Total recharged at or above this counts as a big spender.
cfgTierMidHint: Total recharged at or above this (and below big) counts as mid.
cfgChurnInactiveHint: No activity for at least this many days flags churn risk.
cfgDropWindowHint: Compares recent N days against the prior N days of daily spend.
cfgDropThresholdHint: Daily spend falling by at least this percent counts as a drop.
cfgMinSnapshotHint: No spend-drop signal until this many days of history accumulate.
cfgChurnAlertsHint: When on, the snapshot loop opens customer-churn alerts per site. Off by default.
